signals.headline: Kon Knueppel Named Eastern Conference Rookie of the Month** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[3]
signals.raw:
Kon Knueppel Named Eastern Conference Rookie of the Month** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[3].  
The NBA announced today that Charlotte Hornets rookie Kon Knueppel has won Kia NBA Eastern Conference Rookie of the Month honors, recognizing his standout performance amid his historic rookie season where he became the first rookie to lead the NBA in three-pointers made (273)[1][3].

signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA ANNUAL INFLATION RISES TO 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA ANNUAL INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% IN MARCH 2026, UP FROM 2.0% PRIOR BUT BELOW 2.4% FORECAST | YES | HIGH**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, confirming Statistics Korea data released recently and missing market expectations of 2.4%—a development that could shift prediction markets on BoK rate cuts amid steady 2.5% poli
